reasoning: Rep. Haley Stevens has taken significant steps toward launching a Senate campaign for the open Michigan seat. On April 10, Punchbowl News reported she told fellow Democrats she would launch her campaign "imminently," and she recently hired former DSCC Executive Director Christie Roberts as a campaign consultant. Her earlier timeline (from a February Axios report) indicated she planned to make her decision in April. With Easter 2025 falling on April 20, a launch is incredibly likely to happen in the days immediately following the holiday—meaning the last full week of April. Her hiring of top-tier staff, leaks of an "imminent launch", and the remaining 10 days until May 1 give us extremely high confidence that she will officially announce before the resolution date.
